title: BEM-722B minute workflow
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='
'
for d in ['scripts','.github/workflows','governance/state','governance/reports','governance/codex/proofs','governance/transport','governance/handoff','governance/tasks/pending','governance/agreements/final']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-21 | 12:54 (UTC+3)'
watch=Path('scripts/claude_mailbox_minute_watchdog.py')
watch.write_text('''#!/usr/bin/env python3
import json
from datetime import datetime, timedelta, timezone
from pathlib import Path
SEP="\n"
KYIV=timezone(timedelta(hours=3))
INBOX=[Path("governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt"),Path("governance/audit_mailbox/external_auditor_to_internal_auditor")]
STATE=Path("governance/state/claude_mailbox_minute_watchdog_state.json")
ACTIVE=Path("governance/autonomy/claude_mailbox_watchdog_active.json")
HANDOFF=Path("governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md")
PENDING=Path("governance/tasks/pending/claude_mailbox_autoprocess_next.md")
FINAL=Path("governance/agreements/final")
REPORT=Path("governance/reports/claude_mailbox_minute_watchdog_report.md")
def load(p):
    if not p.exists(): return {}
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(encoding="utf-8", errors="ignore"))
    except: return {}
def decision(t):
    u=t.upper()
    if "CHANGE_REQUIRED" in u: return "CHANGE_REQUIRED"
    if "BLOCKED" in u: return "BLOCKED"
    if "APPROVED" in u or "DECISION: APPROVE" in u: return "APPROVED"
    return "MESSAGE"
def scan():
    out=[]
    for d in INBOX:
        if not d.exists(): continue
        for p in sorted(d.glob("*")):
            if not p.is_file(): continue
            txt=p.read_text(encoding="utf-8", errors="ignore")
            low=(p.name+" "+txt).lower()
            if "bem703" in low or "bem-703" in low or "bem712" in low or "bem-712" in low or "multi-agent strategy" in low or "multi-agent system protocol" in low:
                out.append({"path":str(p),"decision":decision(txt),"preview":txt[:900]})
    return out
now=datetime.now(KYIV).strftime("%Y-%m-%d | %H:%M (UTC+3)")
active=load(ACTIVE)
state=load(STATE)
items=[]; new=[]; latest=None
if active.get("active") is not True:
    status="inactive"
else:
    seen=set(state.get("processed_paths",[]))
    items=scan(); new=[x for x in items if x["path"] not in seen]; latest=new[-1] if new else None
    status="no_response"
    if latest:
        status="result_"+latest["decision"].lower()
        HANDOFF.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True); PENDING.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True); FINAL.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
        if latest["decision"]=="APPROVED":
            final=FINAL/"multi_agent_strategy_v2_1_approved_by_claude.md"
            final.write_text("# Multi-Agent Strategy v2.1 | APPROVED BY CLAUDE"+SEP+SEP+"Дата: "+now+SEP+"Source: "+latest["path"]+SEP+"Decision: APPROVED"+SEP,encoding="utf-8")
            HANDOFF.write_text("# GPT NEXT ACTION | CLAUDE APPROVED STRATEGY"+SEP+SEP+"Дата: "+now+SEP+"Файл: `"+latest["path"]+"`"+SEP+"Final: `"+str(final)+"`"+SEP+"Действие: собрать согласованный протокол v2.1."+SEP,encoding="utf-8")
            PENDING.write_text("# Pending: finalize approved strategy"+SEP+SEP+"Дата: "+now+SEP+"Source: "+latest["path"]+SEP,encoding="utf-8")
        elif latest["decision"]=="CHANGE_REQUIRED":
            HANDOFF.write_text("# GPT NEXT ACTION | CLAUDE CHANGE REQUIRED"+SEP+SEP+"Дата: "+now+SEP+"Файл: `"+latest["path"]+"`"+SEP+"Действие: внести правки и отправить следующий раунд."+SEP,encoding="utf-8")
            PENDING.write_text("# Pending: apply Claude changes"+SEP+SEP+"Дата: "+now+SEP+"Source: "+latest["path"]+SEP,encoding="utf-8")
        elif latest["decision"]=="BLOCKED":
            HANDOFF.write_text("# GPT NEXT ACTION | CLAUDE BLOCKED"+SEP+SEP+"Дата: "+now+SEP+"Файл: `"+latest["path"]+"`"+SEP+"Действие: подготовить unblock plan."+SEP,encoding="utf-8")
            PENDING.write_text("# Pending: resolve Claude blocker"+SEP+SEP+"Дата: "+now+SEP+"Source: "+latest["path"]+SEP,encoding="utf-8")
checks=state.get("checks",[])
checks.append({"time":now,"status":status,"items":len(items),"new":len(new)})
checks=checks[-500:]
STATE.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
STATE.write_text(json.dumps({"schema_version":"claude_mailbox_minute_watchdog_state.v1","status":status,"checked_at":now,"checks":checks,"check_count":len(checks),"items":items,"new_items":new,"processed_paths":sorted(set(state.get("processed_paths",[])+[x["path"] for x in new])),"operator_role":"none"},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+SEP,encoding="utf-8")
REPORT.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
REPORT.write_text("# Claude Mailbox Minute Watchdog"+SEP+SEP+"Дата: "+now+SEP+"Status: "+status+SEP+"Check count: "+str(len(checks))+SEP+"Operator role: none"+SEP,encoding="utf-8")
print(json.dumps({"status":status,"check_count":len(checks),"new":len(new),"operator_role":"none"},ensure_ascii=False))
''')
loop=Path('scripts/claude_mailbox_minute_watchdog_loop.sh')
loop.write_text('''#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
for i in $(seq 1 120); do
  python3 scripts/claude_mailbox_minute_watchdog.py
  STATUS=$(python3 scripts/read_claude_watchdog_status.py)
  git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
  git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
  git add -A governance/state/claude_mailbox_minute_watchdog_state.json governance/reports/claude_mailbox_minute_watchdog_report.md governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md governance/tasks/pending/claude_mailbox_autoprocess_next.md governance/agreements/final
  git diff --cached --quiet && echo "No changes" || git commit -m "BEM-722B claude mailbox minute watchdog tick"
  git pull --rebase --autostash origin main || true
  git push || true
  case "$STATUS" in result_approved|result_change_required|result_blocked) exit 0 ;; esac
  sleep 60
done
''')
reader=Path('scripts/read_claude_watchdog_status.py')
reader.write_text('''#!/usr/bin/env python3
import json
from pathlib import Path
p=Path("governance/state/claude_mailbox_minute_watchdog_state.json")
print(json.loads(p.read_text()).get("status","missing") if p.exists() else "missing")
''')
wf=Path('.github/workflows/claude-mailbox-minute-watchdog.yml')
wf.write_text('''name: Claude Mailbox Minute Watchdog

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
  push:
    paths:
      - 'governance/autonomy/claude_mailbox_watchdog_active.json'
      - 'scripts/claude_mailbox_minute_watchdog.py'
      - 'scripts/claude_mailbox_minute_watchdog_loop.sh'
      - 'scripts/read_claude_watchdog_status.py'
      - '.github/workflows/claude-mailbox-minute-watchdog.yml'

permissions:
  contents: write

concurrency:
  group: claude-mailbox-minute-watchdog
  cancel-in-progress: false

jobs:
  minute-watchdog:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 125
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0
      - name: Syntax check
        run: python3 -m py_compile scripts/claude_mailbox_minute_watchdog.py scripts/read_claude_watchdog_status.py
      - name: Run minute watchdog loop
        run: bash scripts/claude_mailbox_minute_watchdog_loop.sh
''')
checks=[
 {'name':'watchdog_script_exists','pass':watch.exists(),'evidence':str(watch)},
 {'name':'loop_exists','pass':loop.exists(),'evidence':str(loop)},
 {'name':'reader_exists','pass':reader.exists(),'evidence':str(reader)},
 {'name':'workflow_exists','pass':wf.exists(),'evidence':str(wf)},
 {'name':'workflow_no_schedule','pass':'schedule:' not in wf.read_text(errors='ignore'),'evidence':str(wf)},
 {'name':'loop_has_sleep_60','pass':'sleep 60' in loop.read_text(errors='ignore'),'evidence':str(loop)},
]
failed=[x for x in checks if not x['pass']]
status='minute_watchdog_workflow_installed' if not failed else 'failed'
blocker=None if not failed else {'code':'WATCHDOG_WORKFLOW_INSTALL_FAILED','failed':failed}
state_file=Path('governance/state/bem722b_install_minute_watchdog_workflow.json')
state_file.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'install_minute_watchdog_workflow.v1','bem':'BEM-722B','status':status,'checks':checks,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=Path('governance/reports/bem722b_install_minute_watchdog_workflow.md')
report.write_text('# BEM-722B | Install Minute Watchdog Workflow | '+status.upper()+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Minute watchdog workflow installed without schedule trigger. It runs a 60-second loop while active.'+sep+sep+'Blocker: '+('null' if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker,ensure_ascii=False))+sep)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h:
    h.write(json.dumps({'record_type':'bem722b_install_minute_watchdog_workflow','status':status,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':created},ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=Path('governance/codex/proofs/bem722b_install_minute_watchdog_workflow.txt')
proof.write_text('BEM-722B '+status+'
')
changed_files.extend([str(watch),str(loop),str(reader),str(wf),str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Installed minute watchdog script, loop, reader and workflow without schedule trigger; loop checks Claude mailbox every 60 seconds while active')
"""
